attacks.name: Feint Attack
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Doom News
attacks.effect: Return all Energy cards attached to Absol G to your hand. The Defending Pokémon is Knocked Out at the end of your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Luring Flame
attacks.effect: Switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. The new Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Vapor Kick
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Water Pokémon in play, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

abilities.name: Pump Up
abilities.effect: If your opponent has 3 or less Prize cards left, Drifblim FB gets +40 HP.

attacks.name: Shadow Ball
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. Apply Weakness and Resistance.

attacks.name: Dump and Draw
attacks.effect: Discard up to 2 Energy cards from your hand. For each card you discarded, draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Electric Current
attacks.effect: Move a Lightning Energy card attached to Electivire FB to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Dragon Intimidation
abilities.effect: If Garchomp is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent's attack (even if Garchomp is Knocked Out), choose an Energy card attached to the Attacking Pokémon and put it into your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Guard Claw
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Garchomp by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Speed Impact
attacks.effect: Does 120 damage minus 20 damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

abilities.name: Evolutionary Flame
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play Magmortar from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may use this power. Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned and Confused.

attacks.name: Fire Arrow
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Flame Ball
attacks.effect: You may move a Fire Energy card attached to Magmortar to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

description: Metang combined to form it. With four brains, it has the intelligence of a supercomputer.

abilities.name: Gravitation
abilities.effect: Each Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) gets -20 HP. No more than 20 HP can be reduced by all Gravitation Poké-Bodies.

attacks.name: Geo Impact
attacks.effect: If you have a Stadium card in play, this attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that is the same type as the Defending Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Metagross

attacks.name: Trash Burst
attacks.effect: You may discard up to 5 Energy cards from your hand. If you do, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy card you discarded.

attacks.name: Twister
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both are tails, this attack does nothing. For each heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Drain Punch
attacks.effect: Remove from Regigigas FB a number of damage counters equal to the amount of Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rainbow Lariat
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the number of different types of Pokémon SP you have in play.

description: It can launch a rock held in its hand like a missile by tightening then expanding muscles instantly.

attacks.name: Raging Drill
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Rhyperior.

attacks.name: Deep Scrap
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon would be Knocked Out by this attack, discard the top 3 cards from your opponent's deck.

name: Rhyperior

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Root Protector
abilities.effect: Any damage done to Swampert by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon that isn't an Evolved Pokémon is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may switch your opponent's Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Push Over
attacks.effect: Does 60 damage plus 10 more damage for each Fighting Energy attached to Swampert.

attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is affected by any Special Conditions, this attack does 40 damage plus 40 more damage for each of those Special Conditions.

abilities.name: Speed Boost
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Yanmega is your Active Pokémon, you may search your discard pile for a Grass Energy card and attach it to Yanmega. This power can't be used if Yanmega is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Wind Return
attacks.effect: You may return all Grass Energy attached to Yanmega to your hand. If you do, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Energy card you returned.

abilities.name: Extreme Speed
abilities.effect: Arcanine G's Retreat Cost is Colorless less for each Fire Energy attached to Arcanine G.

attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Wailmer but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: Wailmer does 20 damage to itself.

name: Wailmer

description: It can hover is one spot by flapping its wings at high speed. It flits about to guard its territory.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard an Energy card attached to Yanma.

name: Yanma

description: It moves by spinning on its foot. It is a rare Pokémon that was discovered in ancient ruins.

attacks.name: Quick Turn
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Baltoy

description: It converses with others by using magnetic pulses. In a swarm, they move in perfect unison.

attacks.name: Pit Search
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Stadium card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Beldum

description: A comparison revealed that Bidoof's front teeth grow at the same rate as Rattata's.

attacks.name: Whimsy Tackle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Bidoof

description: It spins its two tails like a screw to propel itself through water. The tails also slice clinging seaweed.
name: Buizel

description: For some time after its birth, it grows by gaining nourishment from the seed on its back.
name: Bulbasaur

description: Its ears are always rolled up. They can be forcefully extended to shatter even a large boulder.

attacks.name: Bounce
attacks.effect: Switch Buneary with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Mini Drain
attacks.effect: Remove 1 damage counter from Buneary.

name: Buneary

description: Its tongue is just like a human's. As a result, it can cleverly mimic human speech.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Nosedive
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, Chatot does 10 damage to itself.

name: Chatot

description: The small ball is not only filled with nutrients, it is also tasty. Starly try to peck it off.

attacks.name: Growth
attacks.effect: Attach a Grass Energy card from your hand to Cherubi.

name: Cherubi

description: It is very agile. Before going to sleep, it extinguishes the flame on its tail to prevent fires.

attacks.name: Jump On
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Chimchar

description: There is an orb inside its mouth. When it hops, the orb bounces all over and makes a ringing sound.

abilities.name: Baby Evolution
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may put Chimecho from your hand onto Chingling (this counts as evolving Chingling) and remove all damage counters from Chingling.

attacks.name: Chime
attacks.effect: Search your opponent's discard pile for a Supporter card and use the effect of that card as the effect of this attack. (The Supporter card remains in your opponent's discard pile.)

name: Chingling

description: The trio is together from birth. It constantly gathers honey from flowers to please Vespiquen.

attacks.name: Nap
attacks.effect: Remove 2 damage counters from Combee.

name: Combee

description: Its hardy vitality enables it to adapt to any environment. Its pincers will never release prey.

attacks.name: Sharp Pincers
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Corphish

description: It rarely fights fairly, but that is strictly to ensure survival. It is popular as a mascot.
name: Croagunk

description: The brains in its two heads appear to communicate emotions to each other with a telepathic power.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: Doduo does 10 damage to itself.

name: Doduo

description: Because of the way it floats aimlessly, an old folktale calls it a "Signpost for Wandering Spirits."

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: Drifloon does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

name: Drifloon

description: It is a shabby and ugly Pokémon. However, it is very hardy and can survive on little water.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Count and Draw
attacks.effect: Draw a card for each of your opponent's Pokémon that isn't an Evolved Pokémon.

name: Feebas

description: At rest, it looks just like a rock. Carelessly stepping on it will make it swing its fists angrily.

attacks.name: Focus Fist
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Geodude

description: It attacks using its huge mouth. While its attacks are powerful, it hurts itself out of clumsiness, too.

attacks.name: Sand Attack
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

name: Gible

description: Though it appears very elegant when swimming with fins unfurled, it can jab powerfully with its horn.

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Goldeen.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Goldeen

description: A Pokémon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its Trainer.

attacks.name: Fireworks
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to Growlithe.

name: Growlithe

description: Its legs are short. Whenever it stumbles, its stiff antennae clack with a xylophone-like sound.
name: Kricketot

description: A Magikarp living for many years can leap a mountain using Splash. The move remains useless, though.

attacks.name: Flail Around
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Magikarp

description: The faster the units at its sides rotate, the greater the magnetic force they generate.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Magnemite

description: It lives in treetop colonies. If one becomes enraged, the whole colony rampages for no reason.

attacks.name: Extra Punch
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is a Pokémon LV.X, this attack does 10 damage plus 50 more damage.

name: Mankey

description: It always trains deep in mountains. It levitates when it heightens its spiritual power through meditation.

attacks.name: Karate Chop
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on Meditite.

name: Meditite

description: It is nocturnal in nature. If it spots something shiny, its eyes glitter brightly.

attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Meowth

description: It mimics the expressions and motions of those it sees to understand the feelings of others.

abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may put Mr. Mime from your hand onto Mime Jr. (this counts as evolving Mime Jr.) and remove all damage counters from Mime Jr.

attacks.name: Encore
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can use only that attack during your opponent's next turn.

name: Mime Jr.

description: To alert it, the fin on its head senses the flow of water. It has the strength to heft boulders.

attacks.name: Mud Sport
attacks.effect: If Mudkip has less Energy attached to it than the Defending Pokémon, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Mudkip

description: It grows underground, sensing its surroundings using antennae instead of its virtually blind eyes.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Dash Attack
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Nincada

description: A pair may be seen rubbing their cheek pouches together in an effort to share stored electricity.

attacks.name: Pachi
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Pachirisu

description: Mushrooms named tochukaso grow on its back. They grow along with the host Paras.

attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Paras

description: It occasionally uses an electric shock to recharge a fellow Pikachu that is in a weakened state.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Pikachu

description: A poor walker, it often falls down. However, its strong pride makes it puff up its chest without a care.
name: Piplup

description: Its powerful tackles can destroy anything. However, it is too slow witted to help people work.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Rhyhorn

description: The more healthy the Roselia, the more pleasant its flowers' aroma. Its scent deeply relaxes people.

attacks.name: Spit Poison
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Roselia

description: To protect itself from attackers, it curls up into a ball. It lives in arid regions with minimal rainfall.
name: Sandshrew

description: A Pokémon that lives on icebergs. It swims in the sea using the point on its head to break up ice.

attacks.name: Icy Wind
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Seel

description: The extension and contraction of its muscles generates electricity. It glows when in trouble.
name: Shinx

description: It spouts poison spores from the top of its head. These spores cause pain all over if inhaled.

attacks.name: Stun Spore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Shroomish

description: As soon as the tail claws close, its needle tips secrete poison. It can survive a year without food.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Tail Smash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Skorupi

description: Because they are weak individually, they form groups. However, they bicker if the group grows too big.
name: Starly

description: It appears as if it is skating on water. It draws prey with a sweet scent from the tip of its head.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Surskit

description: The shell on its back is made of soil. On a very healthy Turtwig, the shell should feel moist.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage.

name: Turtwig

description: Usually, its cries are like quiet murmurs. If frightened, it shrieks at the same volume as a jet plane.

attacks.name: Tone-Deaf
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Whismur

description: It checks its surroundings and location using reflections of the ultrasonic waves from its mouth.

attacks.name: Quick Turn
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Zubat

effect: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card. Whenever any player plays any Pokémon from his or her hand to Level-Up 1 of his or her Pokémon, remove 4 damage counters from that Pokémon.
name: Battle Tower

effect: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card. The Retreat cost for each Pokémon SP (both yours and your opponent's) is Colorless less.
name: Champion's Room

effect: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card. Look at the top 7 cards of your deck, choose 1 of them, and put it into your hand. Put the other cards back on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.
name: Cynthia's Guidance

effect: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card. Flip 2 coins. If either of them is heads, look at your opponent's hand. For each heads, choose 1 card from your opponent's hand and put it on the bottom of your opponent's deck in any order.
name: Cyrus's Initiative

effect: Flip a coin. If heads, put all cards in your hand on top of your deck. Then, search your deck for any 1 card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
name: Night Teleporter

effect: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card. Search your discard pile for up to 5 in any combination of Pokémon and basic Energy cards. Show them to your opponent and shuffle them into your deck.
name: Palmer's Contribution

effect: Search your discard pile for a Supporter card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand.
name: VS Seeker

abilities.name: Darkness Send
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Absol G LV.X from your hand onto your Active Absol G, you may flip 3 coins. For each heads, put the top card from your opponent's deck in the Lost Zone.

attacks.name: Darkness Slugger
attacks.effect: You may discard a card from your hand. If you do, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

abilities.name: Burning Spirit
abilities.effect: Any damage done by attacks to a Burned Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) is increased by 40 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). No more than 40 damage can be added by all Burning Spirit Poké-Bodies.

attacks.name: Jet Shoot
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Blaziken FB by attacks is increased by 40 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

abilities.name: Call for Power
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move an Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to Charizard G. This power can't be used if Charizard G is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Malevolent Fire
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard all Energy attached to Charizard G.

abilities.name: Energy Recycle
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. If you do, your turn ends. Search your discard pile for up to 3 Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. This power can't be used if Electivire FB is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Powerful Spark
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Healing Breath
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Garchomp C LV.X from your hand onto your Active Garchomp C, you may remove all damage counters from each of your Pokémon SP.

attacks.name: Dragon Rush
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy attached to Garchomp C. Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Garchomp C can't use Dragon Rush during your next turn.

abilities.name: Dragon Spirit
abilities.effect: If Rayquaza C is your Active Pokémon and is damaged but not Knocked Out by an opponent's attack, you may search your discard pile for an Energy card and attach it to Rayquaza C.

attacks.name: Final Blowup
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to Rayquaza C. Ignore this effect if you have no cards in your hand.

abilities.name: Fast Call
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a Supporter card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can't be used if Staraptor FB is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Defog
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, you may discard any Stadium card in play. If you do, this attack's base damage is 70 instead of 40.

description: This legendary Pokémon is said to freeze the water in the air during winter, causing snow.

attacks.name: Diamond Dust
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Articuno

description: The flames on this legendary Pokémon's wings burn so brightly that they can make night seem like day.

attacks.name: Hyper Flame
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a Fire Energy attached to Moltres. If tails, discard all Energy attached to Moltres.

name: Moltres

description: This legendary Pokémon is said to be present wherever there is a lightning storm.

attacks.name: Lightning Burn
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) If tails, Zapdos does 30 damage to itself.

name: Zapdos

description: Its lovely scales are described as rainbow colored. They change color depending on the viewing angle.

abilities.name: Aqua Mirage
abilities.effect: If you have no cards in your hand, prevent all damage done to Milotic by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Dwindling Wave
attacks.effect: Does 80 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on Milotic.

name: Milotic

description: A rare Pokémon discovered during a deep-sea exploration. It has not changed in over 100 million years.

attacks.name: Deep Sea Pressure
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost is Colorless Colorless more.

attacks.name: Aqua Wave
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

name: Relicanth

description: It can hover in one spot by flapping its wings at high speed. It flits about to guard its territory.

attacks.name: Sonicboom
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

attacks.name: Baton Pass
attacks.effect: You may switch Yanma with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, move as many Energy cards attached to Yanma as you like to the new Active Pokémon.

name: Yanma
